Global (All).title: Global COVID-19 Pandemic
Global (All).summary: WHO reports 3.2 million+ new COVID-19 cases in the past week.

Global (All).title: Russian Invasion of Ukraine
Global (All).summary: Multiple missile strikes hit Ukraine, causing widespread damage.

Global (All).title: US-China Trade Tensions
Global (All).summary: US slaps new tariffs on Chinese imports, escalating trade tensions.

United States.title: Supreme Court Blocks Biden Plan to End Title 42
United States.summary: The US Supreme Court has blocked President Joe Biden's administration from ending the Title 42 border policy, a decision that could have a significant impact on immigration and border security.

United States.title: US and Iran clash over Mahsa Amini's death
United States.summary: The US and Iran have clashed over the death of Mahsa Amini, a 22-year-old Iranian woman who was arrested and died while in custody. The US has imposed new sanctions on Iran in response to her death.

South Korea.title: Severe weather warnings issued in South Korea amid heavy rain
South Korea.summary: Severe weather warnings have been issued in South Korea amid heavy rain, with the Korea Meteorological Administration warning of torrential rain in several provinces. The rain is expected to cause disruptions to daily life, but no major incidents have been reported.

South Korea.title: North Korea fires several ballistic missiles near South Korean territory
South Korea.summary: North Korea has fired several ballistic missiles near South Korean territory, prompting a strong response from Seoul. The missile launch is seen as a provocation and a test of South Korea's military capabilities.

South Korea.title: South Korean court sentences former president to prison
South Korea.summary: A South Korean court has sentenced former President Park Geun-hye to prison for corruption. The sentence is seen as a major blow to the conservative opposition party, which had backed Park's policies.

Japan.title: Japan's Constitutional Reform Plan Sparks Protests
Japan.summary: Demonstrators clashed with police in Tokyo as thousands took to the streets to protest a proposed constitutional reform that would restrict individual freedoms.

Japan.title: North Korea Threatens to Attack Japan Amid Tensions
Japan.summary: North Korea's state media warned Japan of a 'tough response' after a Japanese military official reportedly made anti-Pyongyang remarks.

Japan.title: Tokyo's Covid-19 Outbreak Continues to Grow
Japan.summary: The Japanese capital reported a surge in new COVID-19 cases as the government prepares to lift some restrictions in the coming weeks.
